nodes.label: Regression tests for #2914 state.db tail replay after undo/retry/edit.

save() must NOT auto-clear truncation_watermark when messages have     timestamp
Integration: simulate the full streaming finalize pipeline for two     consecuti
After Edit, the original replaced message must NOT appear in context_messages
After Edit, the original replaced message must NOT appear in agent context     w
A genuine future state.db-only row must merge after the session advances.      B
